pre_game.message: Hey E, I'm G—nice to meet you. I'm really pumped about this game since it could mean winning some cash for folks back home; how about you, what's your take on it?

Hey G, nice to meet you too! I'm totally pumped about this game myself—I'm here to win some money for my family and friends, it could make a big difference. What's your plan for the cash if we pull it off?
Oh, for sure, if we win, I'd use the cash to support my family and friends back home—maybe pay off some bills or take a little trip. How about you, got any fun ideas for yours?

Oh, yeah, I'd probably use my share to help out my family with some bills and maybe splurge on a fun weekend getaway with friends—sounds like we both have similar vibes! What's your background, G, like where are you from?
Oh, cool—I'm from a small town in the Midwest, nothing fancy, just a place where everyone's always looking out for each other; how about you, where are you from?
Oh, that's awesome—I'm from a lively city on the West Coast, it's all about the beaches and vibe, but family keeps me grounded; what's your favorite memory from your hometown?

Oh, one of my favorite memories is going to the county fair every summer with my family—rides, cotton candy, and all that small-town fun; what about you, do you have a go-to memory from the West Coast?

That sounds like a blast, G! One of my favorite memories from the West Coast is family beach bonfires at sunset with s'mores and waves crashing—simple joys; what's your take on teaming up in this game?
Oh, that beach bonfire sounds epic—simple joys like that are the best! Teaming up could be a smart move in this game to boost our chances of winning big for everyone we care about.
Yeah, totally agree—teaming up sounds like a solid plan to help us all win big for our loved ones; it's been great talking with you, G!
Yeah, E, I'm stoked we're aligned on teaming up—it'll be awesome for our families! It's been great talking with you too, take care.
